data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for overtime calculations.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific requirement regarding 'Overtime calculations (time-and-a-half after 8 hours)', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or reads that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking process and financial outputs, but do not address the explicit need for overtime calculations. This indicates a gap in the validation process.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the overtime calculations requirement.
